title: serial insert
text: serial insert Insert specific values into serial fields. USYS$INF_PARAMS serial insert Use This option should be used during bulk load to preserve the existing serial values stored. If used in combination with the procs option, the INF connector does not use the insert stored procedure for tables that contain serial fields. Description If this options is not present, serial insert is not used. For more information on serial fields, see your Informix documentation. Related Links procs Enable stored procedures.
